title: September 22
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 22''' is the 265th day of the year (266th in leap years). There are 100 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1927|1927]] – [[Alf Joint]] is born.
*[[1930s#1937|1937]] – [[Richard Marquand]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[David Jones]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[William O'Connor]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Matt Busch]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Pizzazz 1|''Pizzazz'' 1]] published.
*[[1981]] – [[Ashley Eckstein]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 54|''Star Wars'' (1977) 54]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 66|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 66]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 10|''Star Wars'' (1998) 10]] published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – [[Jackie Burroughs]] dies.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.25]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[A New Hope: The Princess, the Scoundrel, and the Farm Boy]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back: So You Want to Be a Jedi?]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Return of the Jedi: Beware the Power of the Dark Side!]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Insider 160|''Star Wars Insider'' 160]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars: Age of Resistance (hardcover)|''Star Wars: Age of Resistance'' hardcover]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars Insider 197|''Star Wars Insider'' 197]] published.
*[[2021]] – All episodes of ''[[Star Wars: Visions]]'' premiere on [[Disney+]].
**"[[The Duel (short film)|The Duel]]" premieres.
**"[[Tatooine Rhapsody]]" premieres.
**"[[THE TWINS]]" premieres.
**"[[The Village Bride]]" premieres.
**"[[The Ninth Jedi]]" premieres.
**"[[T0-B1 (short film)|T0-B1]]" premieres.
**"[[The Elder (short film)|The Elder]]" premieres.
**"[[Lop & Ochō]]" premieres.
**"[[Akakiri]]" premieres.
*2021 – [[Star Wars: Visions Filmmaker Focus]] premiered on Disney+.
*2021 – [[Bounty Hunters 16|''Bounty Hunters'' 16]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle 1|''Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle'' 1]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 205|''Star Wars Insider'' 205]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Tales of Terror Library Edition]]'' to be published.
